login.lead.text: Newcomers and returning visitors both get straight to their workspace. No passwords — just an email link or a numeric code.
login.email.label: Email address
login.send.label: Send login link
login.terms.label: I agree to the Terms of Service
login.code-lead.text: Or sign in with the numeric code you received (if you can't open the link).
login.code-email.label: Email address
login.code.label: Numeric code (6 digits)
login.code-submit.label: Sign in with code
login.dev-login.label: Sign in with dev token
login.hp.title: After you sign in, a shared bar appears at the top
login.hp.body: The observation-target switch, the Observe / Individuals / Market / Knowledge menus, notifications and My Page all sit along the top of the screen.
login.arc-in.title: Get in without fuss
login.arc-in.body: We just email you a link. If you can't open it, the numeric code in the same email works too.
login.arc-start.title: Set up your space
login.arc-start.body: First choose a display name and language, then agree to the terms (only those two are required).
login-sent.lead.text: We sent a login link to {{params.email}} (valid for 15 minutes).
login-sent.code-lead.text: If you can't open the link on another device or an in-app browser, enter the numeric code from the email.
login-sent.code.label: Numeric code (6 digits)
login-sent.code-submit.label: Sign in with code
login-sent.back.label: Wrong email address? Re-enter it
login-sent.notice.title: The same screen appears even if this email isn't registered
login-sent.notice.body: This is a safety measure so no one outside can tell whether an address is registered (enumeration protection). If this isn't your address, re-enter it below.
